description: Fashion focused men will love the new summer-style twist in these sunglasses from cat. Keep your eyes protected from the sun's harsh rays with these stylish shades. Wear them when you're on your bike or while driving, to prevent anything from bothering your eyes.Lens size: 65 mmLens colour: MulticolourFrame color: BrownWarranty: 1 yearTinted high optical precision and impact resistant lensStylised plastic frame in an aerodynamic design for absolute comfort and durabilityRounded rectangular lens for absolute style and protection from elementsFlexible hinges for durabilityFixed nose holder with a thick bridge which is part of the frame to hold the glasses in place, ensuring there is no friction with the skinCareRemove dust and grime by gently wiping the lens with the cloth providedRemove oil or tough stains with the help of a lens cleanerDo not use your fingers on such stainsDo not place glasses on uneven surface or heated areas like the dashboard of a carwww.cat.com (c) 2014 Wolverine World Wide.
